access.guest_fallback_message: Detailed explanations are available for logged-in Saola students only.

q37.explanation: Cần điền/chọn thông tin đúng từ bài đọc. Ở đoạn 5, bài viết nêu: "Eggs dry out in hot, arid conditions, causing a drastic decrease in hatch rate. Monarchs prefer milder temperatures. Once they reached their winter sites in Mexico, the monarchs encountered scarce and deteriorating forests, the direct result of illegal logging.". Cụm illegal logging khớp với yêu cầu câu hỏi và đúng giới hạn từ nếu đề có quy định.
q37.evidence: Eggs dry out in hot, arid conditions, causing a drastic decrease in hatch rate. Monarchs prefer milder temperatures. Once they reached their winter sites in Mexico, the monarchs encountered scarce and deteriorating forests, the direct result of illegal logging._

q38.explanation: Cần điền/chọn thông tin đúng từ bài đọc. Ở đoạn 6, bài viết nêu: "Mexican officials now hope to use the successful programme of anti-logging patrols and payments to rural residents to solve other forestry conflicts throughout the country. The government, environmental groups and private donors have also spent millions of dollars to get residents of forest communities in butterfly reserve areas to plant trees and start eco-tourism businesses in order to benefit from the widespread fascination with the monarchs’ yearly multi-generational migration through Canada, the United States and Mexico.". Cụm eco-tourism businesses khớp với yêu cầu câu hỏi và đúng giới hạn từ nếu đề có quy định.
q38.evidence: Mexican officials now hope to use the successful programme of anti-logging patrols and payments to rural residents to solve other forestry conflicts throughout the country. The government, environmental groups and private donors have also spent millions of dollars to get residents of forest communities in butterfly reserve areas to plant trees and start eco-tourism businesses in order to benefit from the widespread fascination with the monarchs’ yearly multi-generational migration through Canada, the United States and Mexico._

q39.explanation: Cần điền/chọn thông tin đúng từ bài đọc. Ở đoạn 7, bài viết nêu: "While Mexicans have started using monarch butterflies for eco-tourism, Americans and Canadians are using them for butterfly releases, which are now particularly popular at weddings. Dealers in monarch butterflies claim that releases are great for almost any special occasions, but releasing butterflies during a wedding can have a special significance for some couples. Some say it signifies that their love is as beautiful as the butterflies themselves.". Cụm a wedding or (at) wedding khớp với yêu cầu câu hỏi và đúng giới hạn từ nếu đề có quy định.
q39.evidence: While Mexicans have started using monarch butterflies for eco-tourism, Americans and Canadians are using them for butterfly releases, which are now particularly popular at weddings. Dealers in monarch butterflies claim that releases are great for almost any special occasions, but releasing butterflies during a wedding can have a special significance for some couples. Some say it signifies that their love is as beautiful as the butterflies themselves._

q40.explanation: Cần điền/chọn thông tin đúng từ bài đọc. Ở đoạn 7, bài viết nêu: "Dealers recommend that the environmental conditions should be right. The temperature should be above 55°F and it should be sunny outside for the best effect, although butterflies can fly in light rain as well. There must still be a little bit of light as monarch butterflies will not fly at night, although sometimes they will fly for about 20 minutes after the sun sets.". Cụm environmental conditions khớp với yêu cầu câu hỏi và đúng giới hạn từ nếu đề có quy định.
q40.evidence: Dealers recommend that the environmental conditions should be right. The temperature should be above 55°F and it should be sunny outside for the best effect, although butterflies can fly in light rain as well. There must still be a little bit of light as monarch butterflies will not fly at night, although sometimes they will fly for about 20 minutes after the sun sets._
